title: Blue Disposable Vinyl Gloves Large Size Pack of 100 Protective Gloves for Automotive, Crafting, Assembly & Hygiene Tasks Industrial Daily use Disposable Gloves.
features: Includes 100 Large Size Blue Vinyl Gloves for automotive, crafting, assembly, and hygiene applications.
Powder-free, latex-free vinyl reduces irritation while maintaining safe hand coverage.
Flexible, large blue vinyl gloves pack of 100 provide dexterity for precise, detail-oriented tasks.
Smooth finish ensures reliable grip on tools, instruments, or packaging materials.
description: The Blue Vinyl Gloves Large Size Pack of 100 delivers dependable protection for hands during automotive work, crafting, assembly, or hygiene tasks. Made from powder-free, latex-free vinyl, these gloves fit large hands comfortably, allowing flexibility, dexterity, and touch sensitivity for intricate work. Resistant to grease, dust, and light chemicals, they are perfect for maintenance, food handling, packaging, and cleaning jobs. With 100 gloves per box, this disposable solution provides professional-grade hand protection for home, workshop, and industrial applications.
